<!--
Documentation-only PR.

This template is for changes that do not touch code, build configuration, or anything the compiler/test runner cares about. If your diff includes any *.cs, *.csproj, *.props, *.targets, *.slnx, global.json, *.editorconfig, analyzer release tracking, or anything else that affects the build, this is the wrong template — use the Code Changes template instead. Docs PRs may not contain code changes.

Comment blocks are for you — keep, edit, or delete them as you go.
-->
